title: Sinnsally Silicone Ice Cube Trays,15 Square Ice Cube Tray with Lid,3 Pack Ice Cube Moulds Set,Ice Molds Silicone,Ice Cube Maker,Large Ice Trays for Whiskey Freezer Containers,Easy Release & BPA Free
features: 【High Quality】Compared to the stiff plastic ice trays, our flexible ice trays are made of food grade silicone. BPA free, nontoxic, odorless, and durable. Our silicone big ice cube trays can withstand long-term low-temperature storage without breaking. No longer worry about breaking easily. Say goodbye to those cheap disposable ice trays!

【Large Ice Cube Moulds With Removable Lid】This set includes 3 premium silicone ice trays with 15 large ice cubes per tray. You can make 45 x 1.4" square ice at once. Large silicone freezing tray with clear tight fitting lid that keeps food or ice fresh and sanitary by preventing ice/food from absorbing freezer odors.Furthermore, these easy-release trays stack easily and neatly in the freezer without sticking.

【Very Easy to Release】Just fill with water, juice, cover it,and just put it into the freezer, you will have perfect ice cubes. Anyone can remove or release the ice cubes from the mold with the ease. No need for awkward bending or twisting, removing the ice cube isn't a tough job anymore! Dishwasher safe and easy to clean off.

【Versatile Ice Tray】The large square ices are perfect to chill cocktails, whiskey, tequila, vodka or other drinks with less dilution. You can fill the ice cube mold with fruits, ice cream, soda and wine to customize your favorite flavor. It’s safe to touch food or drink directly, and effective in freezing liquids like fruit juice, soup etc.

【Our Service】Your purchase is risk-free. We believe in our silicone ice cube trays so much that if for any reason you are not fully satisfied, please feels free to contact us 24-hours customer support. Get one and DIY your favorite drinks, cola, juice, coffee with the creative ice cube mold for this summer!
description: Product Description Features Food Grade Silicone. Stackable & Durable and Soft. Easy Release, BPA Free & Dishwasher Safe. Each ice tray is equipped with a silicone lid to keep out unwanted odors and tastes from the freezer. Perfect to chill cocktails, whiskey, tequila, vodka or other drinks with less dilution. NOTES Wash it with hot water before using it for the first time. Do not use metal brush to clean these ice cube trays. Please don't add too much water in case to the cover and the ice from sticking together. Place the ice cube trays smooth in refrigerator to avoid overflowing.
